title: Domgrin
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Image}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Domgrin |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the portions of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] and [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] that fall in grid square K-6 in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]. |sector=[[Prefsbelt sector/Legends|Prefsbelt sector]] |system=[[Domgrin system/Legends|Domgrin system]] |coordinates=K-6 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes=[[Entralla Route/Legends|Entralla Route]]''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation=[[Imperial Remnant]] }} {{Quote|So what exactly was this message from Karrde?''"
"''[…] We're to meet him and Booster at Domgrin as quickly as we can get there.|[[Mara Jade Skywalker]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|''[[Survivor's Quest]]''}} '''Domgrin''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]{{CSWECite|I|196|Domgrin}} that was located within the [[Domgrin system/Legends|Domgrin system]], a part of the [[Prefsbelt sector/Legends|Prefsbelt sector]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was located relatively close to the planet [[Gonmore]]. {{Planet-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' {{Ab|Survivor's Quest (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Domgrin}} {{Reflist}} [[Category:Locations along the Entralla Route]] [[Category:Planets in the New Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Prefsbelt sector locations]]
